title: Eva Topic routes
$comment: Schema for mapping topic patterns to target Agents. / 将 Topic pattern 映射到目标 Agent 的 schema。

routes.$comment: Ordered route rules evaluated by the scheduler. / Scheduler 按顺序评估的路由规则。

items.$comment: Single route rule. / 单条路由规则。

pattern.$comment: Topic pattern beginning with '/'. / 以 '/' 开头的 Topic pattern。

delivery.$comment: Delivery mode for matched events. / 命中事件的投递模式。

agents.$comment: Target Agent ids. / 目标 Agent ID。
